questionHtml: Explain how the presence of a Y chromosome in the cells of a human embryo causes it to develop as a male.
markschemeHtml:
1. gene/genetic information on Y chromosome causes embryo to develop testes;
  2. (developing) testes in embryo secrete testosterone;
  3. testosterone causes male genitalia/penis to develop;

 

Accept SRY gene in mp-a

meta.title: Explain how the presence of a Y chromosome in the cells of a human embryo causes it to develop as a male.
breadcrumbLabels: D3.2.11. Sex determination in humans and inheritance of genes on sex chromosomes
